paper_title: Paleoclimate Reconstruction Using Speleothem Samples from Tham Doun Mai Cave

methods.description: Process for preparing and analyzing speleothem samples for stable isotope and trace element analysis to reconstruct paleoclimate conditions.

steps.description: Each stalagmite was sectioned in half along the growth axis, and later polished to help identify the central growth axis.
steps.searchable_summary: section and polish stalagmites to identify growth axis

steps.description: Samples for isotope ratio measurements were drilled along the stalagmite's central growth axis.
steps.searchable_summary: drill samples for isotope ratio measurements

steps.description: Stalagmite surfaces and drill bit were cleaned with ethanol prior to sampling.
steps.searchable_summary: clean stalagmite surfaces and drill bit with ethanol

steps.description: Powdered calcite samples were analyzed for stable isotope composition utilizing a Kiel IV carbonate device coupled with a Thermofinnigan Delta V Plus isotope ratio mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze calcite samples for stable isotope composition

steps.description: Mg/Ca was analyzed in TM5 calcite powders using splits from the material originally drilled for stable isotope analyses.

methods.description: Procedure for analyzing radiocarbon content in speleothem samples to determine Dead Carbon Proportion (DCP) and correlate with other geochemical data.

steps.description: Fifteen samples from TM5 were analyzed for 14 C at the W.M. Keck Carbon Cycle Accelerator Mass Spectrometer.
Carbonate subsamples were leached in 10% HCL, and then hydrolyzed in 85% H3PO4.
DCP was calculated following methods described by ref. 63, utilizing IntCal13 data for the atmospheric 14C activity at the time of formation.

methods.description: Simulations using the Earth system model EC-Earth to study middle Holocene climate conditions, focusing on ocean-atmospheric teleconnections and feedback processes.

steps.description: Simulations were run using the Earth system model EC-Earth version 3 with specific boundary conditions for the middle Holocene.
steps.searchable_summary: run EC-Earth model simulations for middle Holocene

steps.description: Boundary conditions for the middle Holocene experiments were set at preindustrial values according to the PMIP/CMIP5 protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: set boundary conditions for Holocene experiments
